title: Wankle
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Wankle.jpg]] |name=Wankle |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{JournalCite|11|Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{Fact}} |pronouns=He/him{{Fact}} |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Captain Wankle, we found nothing out of the ordinary except several crates of Bantha Breakfast Biscuits.''"
"''Blue sauce?''"
"''Plenty, Sir!''"
"''Inform the men there'll be a special meal tonight!|A stormtrooper and Captain Wankle discussing the cargo of the ''Chubby Gundark''|}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Wankle''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He [[Commander/Legends|commanded]] an [[Unidentified Imperial-class Star Destroyer (Sullust)|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] and was stationed near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]. Sometime during the Galactic Civil War, Wankle crossed paths with the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] Captain [[Bungo Bung]]. During a cargo inspection on Bung's [[Starship/Legends|vessel]], the ''[[Chubby Gundark]]'', Wankle ordered the confiscation of a large amount of [[Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]s—a popular [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]] produced by [[Biscuit Baron]]—from him. Several [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] later, Wankle's [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] once again encountered the ''Chubby Gundark''. This time, Captain Bung allowed Wankle to confiscate his last remaining crate of Bantha Breakfast Biscuits without argument. Unknown to Wankle, the contents of the case had been contaminated, and was on the verge of mutating into a ravenous lifeform known as a [[Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Ah, another ship. Let's see what they have for us.|Captain Wankle|}} Wankle was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|naval]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] serving the Galactic Empire during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Commander/Legends|Commanding]] an [[Unidentified Imperial-class Star Destroyer (Sullust)|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], he was stationed near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} and was responsible for conducting cargo inspections on [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] entering and exiting the system. Sometime during the Galactic Civil War, Wankle's [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] intercepted the [[Nyubba-class cargo barge driver|''Nyubba''-class cargo barge driver]] ''[[Chubby Gundark]]'', which was owned by the [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] and commanded by [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bungo Bung]]. Wankle ordered the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] to be inspected, and the ''Chubby Gundark'' was taken aboard the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]]. Wankle personally supervised the inspection, and the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] leading the search reported that the vessel was carrying forty cases of [[Biscuit Baron]]'s [[Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]]. After inquiring if there was [[blue sauce]] to go with them and receiving a positive reply, Wankle ordered thirty-nine of the cases to be confiscated so that his men could enjoy a special meal. When Captain Bung's [[Droid/Legends|droid]], [[42-RST]], inquired about Wankle's actions, he bluntly told her that he could do what he wanted, and they were lucky that he was leaving them anything. When his men had taken the cargo off the ''Chubby Gundark'', he allowed the vessel to be on its way. [[File:Wankle2.jpg|thumb|right|Captain Wankle takes possession of a crate of Bantha Breakfast Biscuits.]] Two [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] later, Wankle's Star Destroyer intercepted the ''Chubby Gundark'' again near Sullust. The vessel was returning from a [[Great Bantha Breakfast Biscuit Run|run]] to the Outer Rim planet [[Gastrula]], where Bung and RST-42 had been conducting a booming [[Merchant/Legends|trade]] in Bantha Breakfast Biscuits with the native [[Gastrulan]]s. The ''Chubby Gundark'' was again inspected by Captain Wankle. However, this time, Captain Bung handed over the single crate of Bantha Breakfast Biscuits that he was carrying without argument, although he did apologize for having no blue sauce to accompany it. Wankle was unaware that the crate of biscuits had been contaminated—the preservatives in the [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]] had mixed with the stale air in the ''Chubby Gundark''{{'s}} hold. The resulting combination would eventually produce a [[Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit]], a ravenous creature that would eat anything in its path. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|You tell Mouseman that we will take what we want! And he'll be lucky if we don't shove what's left down his throat!|Captain Wankle to 42-RST after the Imperial captain confiscated a shipment of Bungo Bung's Bantha Breakfast Biscuits|}} Wankle had [[Color/Legends|black]] hair, and wore the uniform of an Imperial naval officer. A no-nonsense Imperial officer, Wankle used his position to intimidate individuals less powerful that he was, and displayed offensive behavior to non-Humans by calling them names, such as referring to the Sullustan Bungo Bung as "mouseman." Despite this, he had a genuine concern for the crew under his command, going so far as to procure a special meal for them. ==Behind the scenes== Wankle was created by [[James Anderson|Jim Anderson]] for the story ''[[Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out]]'' that appeared in the [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 11|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 11]] in [[1996]]. The story was both written and illustrated by Anderson. Originally, Anderson had planned to write a series of comic adventures starring Bungo and Rusti, but since [[Dark Horse Comics]] was the sole comic licensee the idea had to be abandoned. Dark Horse overlooked the publication of ''Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out'' since they believed it to be a one-shot story.{{WebCite|url=http://www.theforce.net/comics/fancomics/bungo&rusti/faqs.html|text=Bungo n' Rusti Frequently Asked Questions|author=[[James Anderson]]|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20160101200202}} However, the character has also appeared in the unlicensed ''Bungo n' Rusti Join the Rebellion?!! Part I'' and ''II'' by Anderson that can be found on [[TheForce.net]].{{WebCite|url=https://www.theforce.net/comics/fancomics/bungo&rusti/index.shtml|text=Bungo and Rusti Star Wars Comics!|author=[[James Anderson]]|work=[[TheForce.net]]|archivedate=20210725123043}} In material Anderson released on TheForce.Net, he revealed that Wankle's Star Destroyer was named the ''Excessive'', and that his ship was attacked by a Giant Amorphous Bantha Breakfast Biscuit that evolved from the crate of Bantha Breakfast Biscuits he confiscated from Captain Bung. Wankle lost his ship in the incident, as well as his nose, which was replaced by a prosthesis. He was subsequently assigned to command the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''Upheaval'' with the mission of tracking down the Sullustan [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]].{{WebCite|url=http://www.theforce.net/comics/fancomics/bungo&rusti/wankle.html|text=Jim Anderson's Wankle's biography|work=[http://www.theforce.net/ TheForce.net]|archivedate=20201124114523}} ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|11|Bungo n' Rusti Get Carry-Out}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Wankle}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Navy captains of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
